The '''37th Imperial Fighter Wing''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Fighter wing/Legends|fighter wing]] that served with the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]].

[[File:ReslianPurge-XWingRogueSquadron25.jpg|thumb|left|160px|[[Tunroth]]s fight against the [[Reslian Purge]] with the aid of the 37th Imperial Fighter Wing.]]

[[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]] was assigned to its [[6/37th|sixth squadron]], under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Lun Tessra]], based aboard the ''[[Abrogator]]''. [[Zelen]] also flew as a part of the unit. Just after Fel transferred, the 37th was engaged in [[Battle of Saloch|combat]] at [[Saloch²]].
